Admissions

Join the Greencrest Advent School Community

How to Apply

1

Inquiry & Visit

Contact our admissions office to learn more about the school and schedule a visit. We encourage families to tour our facilities and meet with our staff to see if Greencrest Advent School is the right fit for your child.

2

Application Form

Complete the application form, which can be obtained from our admissions office or downloaded from our website. Submit the completed form along with required documents (see Requirements section below).

3

Assessment & Interview

Students may be required to take an assessment test appropriate to their grade level. An interview with the student and parents may also be conducted to ensure a good fit between the family and the school's values and expectations.

4

Acceptance & Enrollment

Upon acceptance, you will receive an offer letter. Complete the enrollment process by submitting required fees and documentation. Our admissions team will guide you through each step.

Admission Requirements

Required Documents

  • ✓ Completed application form
  • ✓ Birth certificate (original and copy)
  • ✓ Previous school reports (for transfers)
  • ✓ Medical records and immunization card
  • ✓ Two recent passport-size photographs
  • ✓ Parent/guardian identification documents
  • ✓ Transfer letter (if applicable)

Age Requirements

  • ECD: 3-5 years old
  • Grade 1: 6 years old by January 1st
  • Grade 2-9: Age-appropriate for grade level

Note: Age requirements may vary slightly. Please contact our admissions office for specific guidance.

Fees Overview

At Greencrest Advent School, we are committed to providing quality education at reasonable fees. Our fee structure includes tuition, boarding (for boarding students), meals, and other essential services.

Fee Structure (2024 Academic Year)

Tuition (Day Students) Contact for details
Tuition + Boarding Contact for details
Application Fee (One-time) KES 2,000
Development Fee (Annual) Contact for details

Note: Fees are subject to change. Please contact our admissions office for the most current fee structure and payment plans. We offer flexible payment options and scholarships for qualifying students.

Book a Visit

We'd love to show you around! Schedule a visit to tour our facilities, meet our staff, and learn more about what makes Greencrest Advent School special.

Questions About Admissions?

Our admissions team is here to help. Contact us for more information or to schedule a visit.
